dependencies_meta.notes: IFC-002 Domain Model Design completed - bounded contexts defined

implements.description: Implements Document Management (FLOW-021) and Domain Architecture Foundation (FLOW-039)

notes:
Contact aggregate implemented with value objects (ContactId, EmailAddress, PhoneNumber, Name). PrismaContactRepository provides CRUD operations with account relationship handling. Repository pattern follows hexagonal architecture - domain has no infrastructure dependencies.

**DRY Enum Pattern Implementation (ContactStatus)**:
- Domain: CONTACT_STATUSES const array defined in packages/domain/src/crm/contact/Contact.ts
- Values: ['ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', 'ARCHIVED'] as const
- Type: ContactStatus derived via (typeof CONTACT_STATUSES)[number]
- Validators: contactStatusSchema in packages/validators/src/contact.ts derives from domain
- Application: ContactService imports ContactStatus from @intelliflow/domain
- Adapters: PrismaContactRepository casts status as ContactStatus
- API: contact.router.ts uses contactStatusSchema for validation
- Database: status field with @default("ACTIVE") in Prisma schema
- Frontend: ContactStatusBadge component with status filtering

This pattern ensures single source of truth - adding new status values only requires editing the domain layer.
